vllm.title: Clean up kernel unit tests
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR cleans up the kernel unit tests with pytest.mark.parameterize. It also increases the coverage of the tests by adding test cases such as MQA and rotary_dim < head_dim.

vllm.title: Use queue for finished requests
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is probably not necessary, but now we have a strong consistency guarantee that the finished requests won't get updated mid-engine abort

vllm.title: [BugFix] Implement RoPE for GPT-J
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #747 and fixes #590
This PR fixes a bug in the GPT-J model implementation. The GPT-J model uses a rotary embedding that is slightly different from the GPT-NeoX style rotary embedding (which is commonly used for LLaMA and recent models). The difference isn't considered in the vLLM's current imp
